recommendations.title: Thunder Road
recommendations.overview: A police officer faces a personal meltdown following a divorce and the death of his mother.

recommendations.title: The Wolf of Snow Hollow
recommendations.overview: Terror grips a small mountain town as bodies are discovered after each full moon. Losing sleep, raising a teenage daughter, and caring for his ailing father, officer Marshall struggles to remind himself there's no such thing as werewolves.

recommendations.title: The Road to El Dorado
recommendations.overview: Stowing away after a failed con, a pair of swindlers end up on El Dorado, the fabled "city of gold", where they quickly get in over their heads when they are mistaken as gods by the inhabitants.

recommendations.title: Eyes Wide Shut
recommendations.overview: After Dr. Bill Harford's wife, Alice, admits to having sexual fantasies about a man she met, Bill becomes obsessed with having a sexual encounter. He discovers an underground sexual group and attends one of their meetings -- and quickly discovers tha

recommendations.title: It Follows
recommendations.overview: A young woman is followed by an unknown supernatural force after a sexual encounter.

recommendations.title: The Woman in Black
recommendations.overview: A lawyer travels to a small seaside town to settle the estate of a recently deceased woman, but soon becomes ensnared in something much more sinister.

recommendations.title: Pocahontas
recommendations.overview: Pocahontas, daughter of a Native American tribe chief, falls in love with an English soldier as colonists invade 17th century Virginia.

recommendations.title: The Great Hack
recommendations.overview: Data—arguably the world’s most valuable asset—is being weaponized to wage cultural and political wars. The dark world of data exploitation is uncovered through the unpredictable, personal journeys of players on different sides of the explosive Cambri

recommendations.title: Secret Admirer
recommendations.overview: An anonymous love letter left in Michael Ryan's locker on the last day of school wreaks havoc on his life and the lives of everyone who comes in contact with it.

recommendations.title: Nine to Five
recommendations.overview: Three female employees of a sexist, egotistical, lying, hypocritical bigot find a way to turn the tables on him.
